overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic video game showing a character in a trench coat exploring a repurposed grand cathedral interior. The environment features ornate classical architecture mixed with makeshift wooden barricades and corrugated metal, with scattered NPCs inhabiting the dilapidated halls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral hall with ornate domed ceiling

events.description: approaching and entering the wooden barricade doorway at the end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ornate cathedral hall toward a large wooden barricade

entered.detail: high domed ceiling with painted frescoes and gold trim details
tall fluted columns with gold-accented capitals lining the hall
black and white checkered marble tile flooring
red sign with white text reading TRADERS above a shop entrance
makeshift wall constructed of wooden planks and corrugated metal blocking the passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand cathedral hall with ornate domed ceilings and classical marble columns. The floor features a black and white checkered pattern. A red 'TRADERS' sign is visible on the left wall as the character approaches a large wooden barricade doorway at the end of the hall.

events.description: emerging from the wooden doorway into the interior courtyard with a central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, passing the fountain and heading toward the next wooden doorway

notable_agents.action: woman in a blue dress walking across the courtyard from right to left

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with tiered basin in the center of the courtyard
simple wooden park benches arranged around the courtyard
another makeshift wooden barricade doorway leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character enters an interior courtyard featuring a central stone fountain surrounded by wooden benches. The space has a more open feel while remaining enclosed. A woman in a blue dress walks across the courtyard as the character heads toward another wooden barricade doorway on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: large assembly plaza with safety sign wall

events.description: passing through the doorway into the large plaza with the illuminated safety sign

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden platform toward the large safety sign wall at the far end

notable_agents.action: man sitting at a wooden table drinking from a cup

entered.detail: large wall constructed of rusted metal plates with an illuminated sign reading SAFETY in light bulbs
floor covered with wooden planks and scattered mats instead of marble
blue tarpaulin covering a makeshift stall or storage area
rusted metal railings and barriers along the sides

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide plaza with wooden plank flooring and a massive wall at the far end featuring a large illuminated 'SAFETY' sign. The area has a makeshift appearance with blue tarps and metal barriers. Several NPCs are scattered throughout, including a man sitting at a table on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance to safety sign wall structure

events.description: entering the dark doorway at the base of the safety sign wall

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the metal doorway at the base of the safety sign wall

entered.detail: dark metal doorway with a small light above it at the base of the wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the safety sign wall and enters a dark metal doorway. The surrounding plaza elements fall away as the character moves into the narrow entrance, transitioning from the open plaza to an enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a repurposed cathedral that transitions from ornate classical halls into a makeshift refugee plaza. It begins with the character walking across a black and white checkered floor beneath domed ceilings and marble columns, passing a red Traders sign toward a wooden barricade. As the character passes through the doorway, the scene opens into an interior courtyard centered around a stone fountain and wooden benches where a woman in a blue dress crosses their path. The camera then follows the character through another barricade into a wide, makeshift plaza characterized by wooden plank flooring, blue tarps, and scattered NPCs, all leading toward a massive wall topped with an illuminated Safety sign. Finally, the open expanse of the plaza falls away as the character moves toward the base of the wall and enters a dark, narrow metal doorway.
